channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Microsoft is officially killing its Outlook Lite app next month
item.description: The app had already been scheduled for retirement.

item.title: Scientists Discover Potential Path to Treating Down Syndrome
item.description: New research may hold the key to fixing the genetic error responsible for Down syndrome.

item.title: Astronomers Just Nailed Down the Universe’s Expansion Rate… and Now They Have More Questions
item.description: Using a new framework, astronomers arrived at the most precise measurement of our universe’s expansion rate—but things still don’t add up, they say.

item.title: RAMageddon has come for Microsoft’s Surface Pro and Surface Laptop
item.description: Microsoft just raised the prices across its line of Surface devices amid the global RAM shortage. Now, the 13-inch Surface Pro 11 and the 13.8-inch Surface Laptop 7 cost $500 more than their original starting price, going from $999 to $1,499, as reported earlier by Windows Central. Last year, Microsoft stopped selling the $999 versions […]

item.title: What’s in Hasan Piker’s Starter Pack? Creatine, Zyns, Signal
item.description: The internet’s most jacked leftist shares the tech and daily rituals that fuel his marathon streams.

item.title: Thousands of rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive — listen now
item.description: Chicago-based music superfan Aadam Jacobs has been recording the concerts he goes to since the 1980s, amassing an archive of over 10,000 tapes.

item.title: Marine Animals in the Strait of Hormuz Don’t Get a Ceasefire
item.description: As ships return to the Strait of Hormuz, mines, sonar, and congestion continue to reshape the Gulf beneath the surface.

item.title: Of Course That ‘Leaked’ 2026 ‘Winds of Winter’ Release Date Is Fake
item.description: George R.R. Martin's publisher has debunked a tweet claiming that the much-anticipated 'A Song of Ice and Fire' entry would arrive this year.

item.title: 'Accuracy over volume': Here's why high-value pros are using AI to work slower, not faster
item.description: High-earning professionals increasingly use AI tools for validation and error prevention rather than speed, reflecting a shift toward accuracy-focused workflows.

item.title: NZXT to pay $3.45 million settlement over Flex PC rentals
item.description: NZXT and its business partner Fragile have agreed to pay $3.45 million to settle a class-action lawsuit that accused the companies of attempting to "scam" consumers through their Flex PC rental service. The preliminary settlement was filed in a California District Court on April 7th to close a civil RICO case against the Flex program […]

item.title: I’m a smart glasses expert — and Apple’s rumored Meta Ray-Bans rivals could tempt me to switch thanks to one key strength
item.description: Apple's privacy-first approach could help it dominate the smart glasses sector.

item.title: How to watch Atletico Madrid vs. Barcelona online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Atletico Madrid vs. Barcelona in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Liverpool vs. PSG online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Watch Liverpool vs. PSG in the Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: AI influencers are ‘everywhere’ at Coachella
item.description: Coachella kicked off on Friday, and as usual, it's the place to be for online influencers looking to show off their memorable experiences at the festival. A quick scroll through my social media feeds has already shown me many uncannily attractive figures in glitzy outfits, posing for perfectly staged photographs with celebrities. Only some of […]

item.title: Xbox CEO called Game Pass 'too expensive for players' in a leaked memo
item.description: Xbox's new chief exec, Asha Sharma, has only been in charge for a few months but things already seem like they might be changing for the better. Or at the very least, they might be getting cheaper. The Verge reported that the new Xbox CEO wrote a memo to employees addressing the current pricing of the Game Pass subscription service. "Game Pass is central to gaming value on Xbox. It’s also clear that the current model isn’t the final one," Sharma allegedly said. "Short term, Game Pass has become too expensive for players, so we need a better value equation. Long term, we will evolve Game Pass i...

item.title: On ‘Maul: Shadow Lord’, Not Everyone’s Willing to Learn a Lesson
item.description: The new 'Star Wars' animated series prepares Jedi and planets alike for a reckoning with the dark side.

item.title: IBM pays $17M fine to end DOJ suit over DEI programs
item.description: IBM entered into a $17 million settlement agreement on Friday with the U.S. DOJ over allegations that it engaged in “illegal DEI practices.”

item.title: PhD Student Uses Turntable to Create the Most Impractical Drum Machine Ever
item.description: A cleverly designed academic exercise in beatmatching angst.

item.title: Artemis III sera une mission de « premières » décisives pour le retour sur la Lune
item.description: Alors que les astronautes d'Artemis II ont remis le pied sur la terre ferme, la suite est déjà entamée avec la mission Artemis III, qui doit avoir lieu dès l'an prochain. Et si les ambitions de la Nasa ont été revues à la baisse, le défi technique reste tout de même considérable.

item.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
item.description: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

item.title: 'Building gigawatt data centers in the US is becoming increasingly difficult': Why Orbital is taking AI infrastructure into space to solve power and cooling issues
item.description: Orbital outlines its vision for space-based AI infrastructure, using solar-powered satellites to overcome energy and cooling limits and scale compute beyond Earth’s grid.

item.title: The kings of ANC headphones from Bose hit their Black Friday price of $199
item.description: Grab the Bose QuietComfort Headphones for $199 at Amazon right now — the same price we saw during Black Friday.
